name: file_edit
description: Replace all occurrences of a literal string in a file

path.description: Relative path to the file to edit (must be relative, not absolute)

execution.command_template: awk -v old='{{old_string}}' -v new='{{new_string}}' 'BEGIN{len=length(old)} { result=""; s=$0; while ((i=index(s,old))>0) { result=result substr(s,1,i-1) new; s=substr(s,i+len) } print result s }' '{{path}}' > '{{path}}'.tmp && mv '{{path}}'.tmp '{{path}}'
